[textmode.js](../../../../../index.md) / [media](../../../index.md) / [TextmodeImage](../../TextmodeImage.md) / clearConversions

# Method: clearConversions()

```ts
clearConversions(): this;
```

Clear this source's conversion stack and return to single-mode conversion.

The active mode selected through [conversionMode](../../TextmodeSource/methods/conversionMode.md) is preserved.

## Returns

`this`

This instance for chaining.

## Example

<TextmodeApiSandbox profile="textmode.js" language="javascript" title="clearConversions" encoded-code="--" />
